questions.prompt: A train travels east at 60 m/s. An observer is 70 m south of the crossing. How fast is the train moving away from the observer 4 seconds after passing the crossing?

media.alt: Right triangle with eastward train distance 240, southward observer distance 70, and line-of-sight distance 250.
